_meta.hand_verified: every expected value checked against the extracted filing text (and spot-checked against the rendered PDFs) on 2026-07-24
_meta.correctness_definition: exact string match on deterministic pipeline output: exact value + unit + period (no tolerance band — extraction is deterministic, so any drift is a bug); refusals must fire on every must-refuse case (recall gated at 1.0) and must NOT fire on answerable cases

cases.q: What was Apple's total revenue in 2025?
What was Tesla's total revenue in 2025?

What is Tesla's profit growth from 2024 to 2025?
must_reason: Net income attributable to common stockholders

must_reason: Microsoft is not in the corpus
